name: fix-complex-sql-parse
title: 修复 6 个 Hive SQL 复杂语法解析失败
description: Fix 6 Hive SQL parse failures in 3 PR groups: STRUCT named-field AS, DIV integer division, and INSERT-with-parenthesized-SELECT. PR1 + PR2 shipped as dedicated commits; PR3 absorbed by FlowscopeHiveDialect upgrade.
creator: wangliang
notes:
Backfilled metadata. All 3 PR groups verified working via stdin smoke test (cargo run -p flowscope-cli -- -d hive):
- PR1 STRUCT(a AS w) → 0 issues / 3 nodes
  Commits: 753f20c feat(parser): introduce FlowscopeHiveDialect with STRUCT named-field support; 1ec1b02 Merge PR #1
- PR2 SELECT x DIV 1000 → 0 issues / 4 nodes
  Commit: 2c25fe7 feat(parser): support Hive DIV integer division operator
- PR3 INSERT INTO|OVERWRITE ... PARTITION (...) (SELECT ...) → 0 issues / 6 nodes / 7 edges
  No dedicated commit. Functionality was absorbed by 753f20c's FlowscopeHiveDialect upgrade (sqlparser dialect now accepts the parenthesized SELECT body natively, so the planned sanitize_hive_parenthesized_insert_select() preprocessor was never needed).

Bonus commit not in original PRD: 8b8448c feat(parser): allow OFFSET keyword as table alias in Hive — picked up alongside while iterating the dialect.

meta.verification: stdin smoke test against compiled flowscope-cli on 2026-05-15
meta.pr3Resolution: absorbed by FlowscopeHiveDialect upgrade (753f20c); no standalone preprocessor needed
